deep_dive.title: Auto-Configured Explainable Graph Neural Networks for Multi-Site Pollution Prediction
deep_dive.abstract: Accurate particulate matter (PM) prediction is crucial for mitigating air pollution. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) effectively model spatiotemporal dependencies, but predefined graphs limit adaptability, and some datasets complicate learning. This study introduces a graph construction method based on a confusion matrix from a supervised learning process to dynamically capture inter-class relationships. Additionally, a hybrid loss function that combines energy distance and Huber loss is applied to address the vanishing gradient problem and improve learning stability. The approach is evaluated using air pollution data from the University of Utah AirU Pollution Monitoring Network in Salt Lake City, UT, with five GNN models: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), Simple Graph Convolutional Networks (SGConv), Graph Isomorphism Networks (GINs), Graph Attention Networks (GATs), and GraphSage. The experimental results of single- and multistep predictions confirm that GraphSage achieves the highest accuracy in predicting the concentrations of PM${1}$, PM${10}$, and PM$_{2.5}$ over different time horizons. Furthermore, {\color{black} GNNExplainer (Graph Neural Network Explainer) and PGExplainer (Probabilistic Graph Explainer)} are applied to interpret feature importance and graph structure, ensuring model transparency. Results show improved prediction accuracy, with GNN models outperforming traditional machine learning \textcolor{black}{and deep learning models (i.e., Prophet, Long short-term memory, Gated recurrent units} in air pollution forecasting.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: GNN-based PM prediction with hybrid loss; directly addresses air quality forecasting
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于图神经网络的PM预测，混合损失函数，直接面向空气质量预报
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于图神经网络的PM预测，混合损失函数，直接面向空气质量预报
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于图神经网络的PM预测，混合损失函数，直接面向空气质量预报
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Auto-configured explainable GNNs for multi-site pollution prediction using confusion matrix graph construction and hybrid energy-Huber loss, evaluated on real-world air pollution data.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出一种自动配置的可解释图神经网络方法用于多站点污染预测。通过基于混淆矩阵的动态图构建方法捕捉站点间关系，并采用能量距离与Huber损失的混合损失函数解决梯度消失问题。在盐湖城AirU监测网络数据上，使用五种GNN模型验证了有效性。该方法提升了PM预测精度和模型可解释性，适用于空气质量监测应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出一种自动配置的可解释图神经网络方法用于多站点污染预测。通过基于混淆矩阵的动态图构建方法捕捉站点间关系，并采用能量距离与Huber损失的混合损失函数解决梯度消失问题。在盐湖城AirU监测网络数据上，使用五种GNN模型验证了有效性。该方法提升了PM预测精度和模型可解释性，适用于空气质量监测应用。

quick_skim.title: Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling for Function-Space Regression and Inverse Problems
quick_skim.abstract: Principled regression for stochastic processes is a long-standing challenge with deep connections to scientific inverse problems. We introduce Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS), to our knowledge the first function-space posterior sampling framework that unifies stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems. Built on pretrained function-space flow-matching priors, FAPS enables likelihood-guided posterior inference from sparse and noisy observations, supports variable query discretizations, and avoids explicit prior-density evaluation. Its Langevin correction uses a low-rank covariance preconditioner to exploit dominant function-space correlations across discretizations. Across Gaussian and non-Gaussian stochastic-process regression benchmarks and diverse PDE inverse problems, FAPS produces coherent posterior samples with accurate uncertainty quantification, significantly outperforming existing functional regression baselines and achieving competitive or better PDE noisy inverse performance than diffusion-based posterior samplers while reducing test-time sampling cost.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: function-space posterior sampling for PDE inverse problems, applicable to environmental modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 函数空间后验采样方法可应用于环境建模中PDE逆问题
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 函数空间后验采样方法可应用于环境建模中PDE逆问题
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 函数空间后验采样方法可应用于环境建模中PDE逆问题
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS) unifies stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems using pretrained flow-matching priors, enabling likelihood-guided inference from sparse observations without explicit prior density evaluation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出流退火后验采样（FAPS）框架，首次将随机过程回归与PDE逆问题统一在函数空间中。FAPS利用预训练的流匹配先验，从稀疏观测进行似然引导后验推理，无需显式先验密度计算。通过低秩协方差预条件子的朗之万校正，有效利用不同离散化间的函数空间相关。实验表明该方法在多种随机过程回归中表现优异，为环境建模等领域的逆问题提供了通用解决方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出流退火后验采样（FAPS）框架，首次将随机过程回归与PDE逆问题统一在函数空间中。FAPS利用预训练的流匹配先验，从稀疏观测进行似然引导后验推理，无需显式先验密度计算。通过低秩协方差预条件子的朗之万校正，有效利用不同离散化间的函数空间相关。实验表明该方法在多种随机过程回归中表现优异，为环境建模等领域的逆问题提供了通用解决方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: physics-informed machine learning for environmental modeling

quick_skim.title: Data assimilation of flow MRI data into RANS models with algebraic closures
quick_skim.abstract: We adopt the Bayesian inference framework to solve an inverse Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) problem for the approximate posterior probability distribution of the turbulence model parameters and inlet boundary conditions of a confined turbulent jet. The data are noisy 3D flow MRI measurements of a Newtonian fluid flowing through the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) nozzle geometry. We assimilate this into RANS using two algebraic turbulence models based on the mean shear rate magnitude and the turbulence kinetic energy. We demonstrate that the inferred models are able to reconstruct the measured mean flow velocities without overfitting and we provide uncertainty estimates for the model parameters. The methodology can readily be extended to more complex RANS models, provided that they remain differentiable.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: data assimilation of flow MRI into RANS models
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Adopts Bayesian data assimilation to infer turbulence model parameters from flow MRI measurements, reconstructing mean velocities with uncertainty estimates.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文采用贝叶斯推断框架，将流动MRI数据同化到雷诺平均纳维-斯托克斯（RANS）模型中，估计湍流模型参数和入口边界条件的近似后验概率分布。通过两种代数湍流模型，成功重构了测量平均流速并避免过拟合，提供了参数不确定性估计。该数据同化方法可直接迁移至空气质量模型，例如根据观测数据优化化学传输模型参数或进行偏差校正。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文采用贝叶斯推断框架，将流动MRI数据同化到雷诺平均纳维-斯托克斯（RANS）模型中，估计湍流模型参数和入口边界条件的近似后验概率分布。通过两种代数湍流模型，成功重构了测量平均流速并避免过拟合，提供了参数不确定性估计。该数据同化方法可直接迁移至空气质量模型，例如根据观测数据优化化学传输模型参数或进行偏差校正。

quick_skim.title: A Neural Surrogate Approach for Simulating Natural Convection Problems
quick_skim.abstract: This paper presents a neural surrogate approach for improving the accuracy of natural convection problems simulated with a Boussinesq flow model (incompressible flow with heat transfer). Our approach, based on Fourier neural operators, uses training data consisting of matched pairs of simulations run under the computationally cheaper yet less accurate Boussinesq flow model and a more computationally expensive and more accurate compressible flow model. In both cases, we implement our parallelized simulation codes based on an implicit monolithic mixed finite element method (FEM) approach using the open-source FEniCSx framework. Our implementations are validated against a commercial software package, COMSOL, as well as standard test problems from the literature. We include a careful discussion and analysis of data set generation and present learning results in two and three spatial dimensions. Using compressible flow results as high-fidelity reference solutions, our learning approach, with a single model evaluation per simulation, substantially improves the per-channel accuracy of Boussinesq predictions, with structural similarity (SSIM) close to unity across all flow variables and test distributions and corresponding mean-squared error reductions of one to nearly three orders of magnitude. All code and data is released as open-source.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: neural surrogate using Fourier neural operators for natural convection flow
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用傅里叶神经算子的神经代理模型用于自然对流模拟
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用傅里叶神经算子的神经代理模型用于自然对流模拟
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用傅里叶神经算子的神经代理模型用于自然对流模拟
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a neural surrogate (Fourier neural operator) for natural convection, improving accuracy over cheap Boussinesq model. Method transferable to atmospheric transport.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一种傅里叶神经算子（FNO）的神经代理方法，用于提高自然对流（浮力驱动流动）的模拟精度。它利用低成本Boussinesq模型与高成本可压缩模型的配对数据训练，在保持计算高效的同时逼近高保真结果。该方法作为算子学习的一个实例，可迁移至大气传输模拟等相似问题。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一种傅里叶神经算子（FNO）的神经代理方法，用于提高自然对流（浮力驱动流动）的模拟精度。它利用低成本Boussinesq模型与高成本可压缩模型的配对数据训练，在保持计算高效的同时逼近高保真结果。该方法作为算子学习的一个实例，可迁移至大气传输模拟等相似问题。

quick_skim.title: Learning the Koopman Operator using Attention Free Transformers
quick_skim.abstract: Learning Koopman operators with autoencoders enables linear prediction in a latent space, but long-horizon rollouts often drift off the learned manifold, leading to phase and amplitude errors on systems with switching, continuous spectra, or strong transients. We introduce two complementary components that make Koopman predictors more robust. First, we add an attention-free latent memory (AFT) block that aggregates a short window of past latents to produce a corrected latent before each Koopman update. Unlike multi-head attention, AFT operates in linear time and adds only $\approx$30k parameters ($3d^2 + T^2$, fewer than matched multi-head attention), yet captures the local temporal context needed to suppress error divergence. Second, we propose dynamic re-encoding: lightweight, online change-point triggers (EWMA, CUSUM, and sequential two-sample tests) that detect latent drift and project predictions back onto the autoencoder manifold. Across three benchmark systems -- Duffing oscillator, Repressilator, IRMA -- our model consistently reduces error accumulation compared to a Koopman autoencoder and matched-capacity multi-head attention. We also compare against GRU and Transformer autoencoders, evaluated both from initial conditions and with a 50-step context, and find that Koopman+AFT (with optional re-encoding) attains markedly lower long-horizon error while maintaining lower inference latency. We report improvements over horizons up to 1000 steps, together with ablations over trigger policies. The result is a fast, compact predictor that stays on the learned manifold over long horizons.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Koopman operator learning with attention-free transformers for robust surrogate modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用无注意力Transformer的Koopman算子学习用于鲁棒代理建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用无注意力Transformer的Koopman算子学习用于鲁棒代理建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用无注意力Transformer的Koopman算子学习用于鲁棒代理建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: An attention-free transformer approach to learn Koopman operators, improving long-horizon prediction robustness for dynamical systems, applicable as a surrogate model.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种结合无注意力记忆模块的Koopman算子学习框架（AFT），用于提升动力系统长期预测的鲁棒性。该方法通过局部上下文聚合抑制误差发散，在多个非线性系统上验证了其优越性。可作为复杂系统（如空气质量）的代理模型，但尚未直接应用于环境领域。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种结合无注意力记忆模块的Koopman算子学习框架（AFT），用于提升动力系统长期预测的鲁棒性。该方法通过局部上下文聚合抑制误差发散，在多个非线性系统上验证了其优越性。可作为复杂系统（如空气质量）的代理模型，但尚未直接应用于环境领域。

quick_skim.title: Operator Learning on the Data-Driven Multiscale Space for Nonlinear Flow in Random Heterogeneous Porous Media
quick_skim.abstract: We present an operator learning framework based on a coarse data-driven multiscale space for nonlinear flow in random heterogeneous porous media. The multiscale space is constructed from local representative fine-scale solution snapshots, yielding an accurate low-dimensional representation of the solution manifold. This multiscale basis serves as the trunk of a neural operator, while a branch network predicts the corresponding reduced coefficients from the input permeability field. Unlike Galerkin projection methods, the neural operator learns a global nonlinear mapping from permeability fields to solution coefficients, providing greater flexibility, improved accuracy, and eliminating the need for online nonlinear coarse-grid solves and coefficient evaluations. Numerical results show that the proposed approach achieves good accuracy and substantially lower computational cost than projection-based methods for nonlinear flow in high-contrast heterogeneous media.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于偏微分方程代理的神经算子
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于偏微分方程代理的神经算子
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于偏微分方程代理的神经算子
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a neural operator framework using a data-driven multiscale basis for nonlinear flow in porous media, enabling efficient surrogate modeling without online projection.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一种基于数据驱动多尺度空间的算子学习框架，用于随机非均质多孔介质中的非线性流动。通过构建局部代表性细尺度解的快照，获得精确的低维表示，并以此作为神经算子的主干网络，分支网络预测输入渗透率场对应的缩减系数。该方法在继承神经算子灵活性的同时避免在线非线性投影，为复杂物理系统的代理建模提供了通用范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于数据驱动多尺度空间的算子学习框架，用于随机非均质多孔介质中的非线性流动。通过构建局部代表性细尺度解的快照，获得精确的低维表示，并以此作为神经算子的主干网络，分支网络预测输入渗透率场对应的缩减系数。该方法在继承神经算子灵活性的同时避免在线非线性投影，为复杂物理系统的代理建模提供了通用范式。

quick_skim.title: Low-Cost High-Order Singular Value Decomposition for Tensor-Based Reconstruction from Sparse Sensor Measurements: Urban Flow and Air-Quality Applications
quick_skim.abstract: Urban flow and air-quality simulations generate high-dimensional datasets describing velocity and pollutant transport across multiple spatial, temporal, and physical-variable dimensions. Reconstructing these fields from sparse sensor measurements is a fundamental challenge in environmental monitoring, digital twins, forecasting, and data assimilation. Existing low-cost reconstruction approaches are commonly based on matrix decompositions, which require multidimensional datasets to be flattened into two-dimensional snapshot matrices, thereby discarding important structural information. This work introduces the low-cost High-Order Singular Value Decomposition (lcHOSVD), a novel tensor-based sparse-sensing reconstruction framework for high-dimensional environmental fields. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first methodology that combines sparse sensing and HOSVD for field reconstruction. Unlike matrix-based approaches, lcHOSVD preserves the natural tensor structure of the data, enabling the exploitation of correlations across spatial, temporal, and physical-variable dimensions while substantially reducing the computational requirements of conventional HOSVD. The methodology is applied to urban flow and air-quality datasets, where three-dimensional velocity and pollutant concentration fields are reconstructed using only 1-4% of the available spatial locations. While lcSVD provides larger computational speed-ups, lcHOSVD consistently achieves lower reconstruction errors in configurations characterized by strong multidimensional coupling and heterogeneous dynamics across dimensions. Additional sensor-anisotropy analyses demonstrate that the tensor formulation is significantly more robust to uneven sensor distributions, a common situation in practical environmental monitoring networks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: urban flow and air-quality applications, reconstruction from sparse sensors
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 城市流与空气质量应用，从稀疏传感器重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 城市流与空气质量应用，从稀疏传感器重建

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes low-cost High-Order SVD for tensor-based reconstruction from sparse sensors in urban flow and air-quality simulations, aiding monitoring and data assimilation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对城市流和空气质量模拟中从稀疏传感器重建高维数据的问题，该论文提出了一种低成本的张量高阶奇异值分解（lcHOSVD）方法。该方法通过保留多维结构，有效重建速度场和污染物浓度场，为环境监测、数字孪生和数据同化提供了高效工具。实验表明其在空气污染场重建中优于传统矩阵分解方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对城市流和空气质量模拟中从稀疏传感器重建高维数据的问题，该论文提出了一种低成本的张量高阶奇异值分解（lcHOSVD）方法。该方法通过保留多维结构，有效重建速度场和污染物浓度场，为环境监测、数字孪生和数据同化提供了高效工具。实验表明其在空气污染场重建中优于传统矩阵分解方法。

quick_skim.title: FDN: Interpretable Spatiotemporal Forecasting with Future Decomposition Networks
quick_skim.abstract: Spatiotemporal systems comprise a collection of spatially distributed yet interdependent entities each generating unique dynamic signals. Highly sophisticated methods have been proposed in recent years delivering state-of-the-art (SOTA) forecasts but few have focused on interpretability. To address this, we propose the Future Decomposition Network (FDN), a novel forecast model capable of (a) providing interpretable predictions through classification (b) revealing latent activity patterns in the target time-series and (c) delivering forecasts competitive with SOTA methods at a fraction of their memory and runtime cost. We conduct comprehensive analyses on FDN for multiple datasets from hydrologic, traffic, and energy systems, demonstrating its improved accuracy and interpretability.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: interpretable spatiotemporal forecasting applicable to air quality
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可解释时空预测，可应用于空气质量
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可解释时空预测，可应用于空气质量
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可解释时空预测，可应用于空气质量
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Future Decomposition Network (FDN) for interpretable spatiotemporal forecasting, achieving SOTA performance on hydrology, traffic, and energy datasets with lower cost.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出未来分解网络（FDN），一种兼具可解释性与高精度的时空预测模型。FDN通过分类方式提供可解释的预测，并揭示潜在活动模式。在水文、交通和能源等多个数据集上，FDN以更少的内存和运行时间达到与最先进方法相当的预测性能。其设计可迁移至空气质量预测与偏差校正任务，尤其适用于需要解释性的环境监测场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出未来分解网络（FDN），一种兼具可解释性与高精度的时空预测模型。FDN通过分类方式提供可解释的预测，并揭示潜在活动模式。在水文、交通和能源等多个数据集上，FDN以更少的内存和运行时间达到与最先进方法相当的预测性能。其设计可迁移至空气质量预测与偏差校正任务，尤其适用于需要解释性的环境监测场景。
